muxt generate --use-receiver-type=Server
muxt check

exec go test -race -count=1

-- template.gohtml --
{{- define "POST /v V(ctx, unmarshalForm(body))" -}}{{ .Result.Get "name" }}{{- end -}}
-- go.mod --
module server

go 1.25
-- server.go --
package server

import (
	"context"
	"embed"
	"html/template"
	"net/url"
)

//go:embed *.gohtml
var templatesFS embed.FS

var templates = template.Must(template.ParseFS(templatesFS, "*"))

type Server struct{}

func (Server) V(ctx context.Context, form url.Values) url.Values { return form }
-- server_test.go --
package server

import (
	"net/http"
	"net/http/httptest"
	"strings"
	"testing"
)

func TestValues(t *testing.T) {
	mux := http.NewServeMux()
	TemplateRoutes(mux, Server{})
	req := httptest.NewRequest(http.MethodPost, "/v", strings.NewReader("name=Q"))
	req.Header.Set("Content-Type", "application/x-www-form-urlencoded")
	rec := httptest.NewRecorder()
	mux.ServeHTTP(rec, req)
	if got := rec.Body.String(); got != "Q" {
		t.Fatalf("body = %q, want %q", got, "Q")
	}
}
